title: Dungeons Overhaul
description: Upgrades the vanilla dungeons to a more adventurous experience
body:
**Revamp your Minecraft world with Dungeons Overhaul!**

**! If using Fabric you need to download [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) as well !**


![the center of the adventurous dungeon with great loot](https://i.postimg.cc/pLh159xJ/center.png)


Say goodbye to boring old vanilla monster rooms and choose the epic, procedurally generated dungeons filled with unique layouts, **custom loot**, **dangerous traps**, **mob ambushes**, and immersive adventure! Designed to seamlessly integrate with vanilla and modded worlds, this mod enhances every biome in your minecraft world through adding this next-level **adventurous dungeon structure** in your caves underground.


![the first room of the overhauled dungeon with medium graded loot](https://i.postimg.cc/5NLWDkQV/first_room.png)

**The first room might be easy, but as you approach the center with the OP loot, it gets way more intense and even with full diamond armor, it's challenging.**

So its great for those who are bored with playing vanilla minecraft.

![the op loot in the center of the dungeon containing diamonds, emeralds and enchanted golden apples](https://i.postimg.cc/HkBgY8YW/loot1.png)

![the op loot in the center of the dungeon containing diamonds, emeralds and enchanted golden apples](https://i.postimg.cc/zf9814NS/loot2.png)
